scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/clean-web-assets.mjs && node scripts/optimize-web-images.mjs && node scripts/check-web-bundle.mjs
scripts.deploy:check: npm run check:game && npm run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run check:game && npm run build && wrangler deploy
scripts.check:game: node scripts/check-game-design.mjs && node scripts/check-card-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-combat-zones.mjs && node scripts/check-artificer-devices.mjs && node scripts/check-beast-mechanics.mjs && node scripts/check-reward-strategy.mjs && node scripts/check-investigation-state.mjs && node scripts/check-investigation-archive.mjs && node scripts/check-retry-support.mjs && node scripts/check-progress-goals.mjs && node scripts/check-daily-trial.mjs && node scripts/check-challenge-code.mjs && node scripts/check-run-notebook.mjs && node scripts/check-run-continuity.mjs && node scripts/check-route-node-settlement.mjs
